hero.sub: I help Seed–Series C SaaS CTOs and engineering leaders build scalable SaaS infrastructure for growth-stage velocity. I design automated, secure, high-leverage cloud platforms that scale AI-native products without architectural rewrites.
hero.stat4Label: AWS · GCP · Azure — no vendor bias

experience.heading: Built at real scale.
experience.sub: Since 2010: building system infrastructure that powers organisations at scale. Since 2019: architecting cloud platforms that accelerate engineering velocity and unlock growth. Not theory. Production systems that shipped.
experience.waf2pDesc: Creator of WAF2p — an open-source extension of the Well-Architected Framework for AI-native, cloud-agnostic platform design. Actively contributed and evolved.

portfolio.heading: Architecture that shipped.
portfolio.sub: Real outcomes. Each case reflects the same approach: understand the business pressure, design the right system foundation, enable the team to own it independently.

authority.heading: Proven Architecture at Enterprise Scale
authority.sub: My work has enabled platforms supporting thousands of engineers, mission-critical workloads, and globally distributed systems.

connect.heading: Your platform should outlast your roadmap.
connect.sub: If you're a CTO or engineering leader at a SaaS company scaling from 10 to 100 engineers — and architecture is starting to create friction — let's talk. A 30-minute call costs nothing and usually surfaces the one thing worth fixing first.
connect.note: No sales pitch. No commitment. Just architectural clarity.

blog.heading: Architecture Thinking
blog.sub: Practical writing on cloud architecture, AI-native platform design, and engineering leadership for growth-stage SaaS companies.
blog.emptyDescription: We are preparing practical insights and real-world architecture lessons. Stay updated while we publish the next posts.

about.heading: Christian Weber AI-Native Cloud Architect
about.sub: I help Startup Series A-C SaaS CTOs and engineering leaders <highlight>build scalable SaaS infrastructure for growth-stage velocity</highlight>.
about.description: AI gives engineering teams powerful tool access to accelerate their development if put in structured workflows that outputs <highlight>validated code, production-ready features, tests, and documentation</highlight> in a repeatable way. My approach combines cloud-native patterns with AI-assisted development practices to <highlight>create platforms that are both technically robust and aligned with business objectives</highlight>.
